article.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
article.summary: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.

headline: Japan Pension Fund Eyes 1% Crypto Allocation

article.title: Japanese corporate pension fund plans 1% crypto allocation: Nikkei
article.summary: A Japanese corporate pension fund with about 1,200 participating small and medium-sized businesses plans to allocate roughly 1% of its assets to crypto.

headline: Crude Flows Unimpeded Through Hormuz Strait Amid Tensions

article.title: Oil Keeps Flowing Through Hormuz Despite Iran Saying It’s Shut
article.summary: Millions of barrels of oil continued to flow through the Strait of Hormuz this weekend, even after Iran claimed to have closed the waterway again, as Washington and Tehran offer very contrasting narratives over the status of the world’s most important shipping chokepoint.

article.title: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
article.summary: The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.

headline: Kalshi Targets $2B IPO Amid Crypto Boom

article.title: Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Prediction Market Kalshi Eyes IPO as Revenue Hits $2 Billion 
Prediction market giant Kalshi is exploring a potential IPO for 2027 or 2028 after annualized revenue surpassed $2 billion.

article.title: OpenRouter's Fusion Promises Claude Fable-Level AI for Cheap—Right as Fable 5 Goes Dark
article.summary: OpenRouter's compound-model API stacks budget AI models—and beat GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.8 outright in benchmark testing.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 50% Amid Rising Network Activity

article.title: Bitcoin Network Activity Is Rising as BTC Falls Nearly 50% Below Peak Price: CryptoQuant
article.summary: Activity on the Bitcoin network is surging, CryptoQuant said, but it's not correlating with price movement for its native asset.

headline: $4.67M Stolen in Axelar Bridge Crypto Heist

article.title: Secret Network’s Axelar bridge drained for $4.67 million in infinite-mint exploit that went unnoticed for seven days
article.summary: Secret Network says about $770,000 of the stolen funds still sits in the attacker's Axelar wallet, and that Axelar declined its request to freeze it.

headline: Schwab Launches S&P 500 Binary Options with Cboe

article.title: Charles Schwab is working with Cboe to launch S&P 500 ‘yes-or-no’ binary options contracts: WSJ
article.summary: The binary contracts would mark the brokerage's first move into prediction-market-style products, a sector that Kalshi and Polymarket already dominate.

headline: Oil Prices Surge Ahead of $100B Iran Deal Talks
